ci_5.description: lower simulation or inference interval bound

ci_95.description: upper simulation or inference interval bound

column_name.description: column name observed in a schema audit

column_type.description: column type observed in a schema audit

commoditycode.description: product code from the raw trade dataset

country.description: country identifier used in stage outputs

destination.description: destination country code for distance matrix rows

east_km.description: east-west signed step component in kilometers

end_year.description: last year in the observation sequence

end_year_max.description: maximum final year across countries in the grouped result

end_year_min.description: minimum final year across countries in the grouped result

exp_not_locatable_codes.description: export-side product or country codes without locatable geometry

extra_vs_canonical.description: extra columns versus the canonical schema

files_checked.description: number of files checked in schema validation

final_distance_to_star_km.description: final-year distance to the cluster attractor in kilometers

flow.description: trade flow direction or trajectory family

global_export_distance_km.description: global average export distance in kilometers

global_export_minus_import_distance_km.description: difference between global export and import average distances

global_exports_minus_imports.description: difference between global exports and imports totals

global_import_distance_km.description: global average import distance in kilometers

has_manual_centroid.description: whether a manual centroid exists for the code

historic_in_ne.description: whether the historic code appears in Natural Earth

historic_in_your_codes.description: whether the historic code appears in the local code list

historic_maps_to.description: mapped target for a historic code

historic_target_in_ne.description: whether the historic mapped target exists in Natural Earth

imp_not_locatable_codes.description: import-side product or country codes without locatable geometry

is_historic.description: whether a code is flagged as historic

is_territory_fallback.description: whether a territory fallback was used

issue_files.description: number of files with schema issues

mapped_target_in_natural_earth.description: whether the mapped target exists in Natural Earth

mean_H0.description: expected mean under the null hypothesis

mean_abs_turn_deg.description: mean absolute turning angle in degrees

mean_speed_km_per_year.description: mean trajectory speed in kilometers per year

median_distance_km.description: median distance to attractor in kilometers

min_overlap_steps.description: minimum overlapping steps required for pairwise comparison

min_overlap_years.description: minimum overlapping years required for pairwise comparison

missing_penalty_used.description: penalty parameter applied for missing overlap

missing_required.description: required columns missing from a yearly file

missing_vs_canonical.description: columns missing versus the canonical schema

n.description: number of observations in the modeled set

n_cols.description: number of columns detected in a yearly file

n_countries.description: number of countries represented in the grouped result

n_country_year_obs.description: number of country-year observations in the summary group

n_endpoints_used.description: number of endpoints used to estimate attractors

n_export_partners_total.description: number of export partners before matching

n_export_partners_unmatched.description: number of export partners without coordinates

n_exporter_nodes_matched.description: number of exporter nodes matched to coordinates

n_exporter_nodes_total.description: number of exporter nodes before geographic matching

n_exporter_nodes_unmatched.description: number of exporter nodes without coordinates

n_flows.description: number of trade flows processed in a diagnostic year

n_import_partners_total.description: number of import partners before matching

n_import_partners_unmatched.description: number of import partners without coordinates

n_importer_nodes_matched.description: number of importer nodes matched to coordinates

n_importer_nodes_total.description: number of importer nodes before geographic matching

n_importer_nodes_unmatched.description: number of importer nodes without coordinates

n_lastdirs_used.description: number of last-direction vectors used to estimate attractors

n_missing_distance.description: number of flows without distance information

ok.description: whether validation passed for a file

ok_files.description: number of files passing schema validation

origin.description: origin country code for distance matrix rows

path.description: resolution path or file path string

q25_distance_km.description: 25th percentile distance to attractor in kilometers

q75_distance_km.description: 75th percentile distance to attractor in kilometers

readable.description: whether a file was readable during validation

resolution_method.description: resolution method used for the final geometry assignment

resolution_path.description: resolution path used to obtain the final code assignment

resolved.description: whether a code was resolved to a usable geometry

sample_rank.description: ranking used in trajectory sampling output

sign.description: direction sign for the east-west component

silhouette.description: silhouette score for the selected clustering configuration

silhouette_selected.description: silhouette score attached to the selected clustering result

source_code.description: original source code before mapping or resolution

start_year.description: first year in the observation sequence

std_speed_km_per_year.description: standard deviation of trajectory speed in kilometers per year

straightness.description: ratio between net displacement and path length

target_has_manual.description: whether the mapped target has manual centroid support

target_in_ne.description: whether the mapped target exists in Natural Earth

target_is_territory_fallback.description: whether the mapped target uses a territory fallback

territory_target_in_ne.description: whether the territory target exists in Natural Earth

total_exports.description: total exports value in the output scope

total_exports_value_final_matched.description: matched export total using canonical trade value

total_exports_value_matched.description: matched export total in the global barycenter output

total_imports.description: total imports value in the output scope

total_imports_value_final_matched.description: matched import total using canonical trade value

total_imports_value_matched.description: matched import total in the global barycenter output

total_trade_value.description: total trade value processed in a diagnostic year

unmatched_export_partners_sample.description: sample of export partners without locatable geometry

unmatched_exporter_codes_sample.description: sample of exporter codes without locatable geometry

unmatched_import_partners_sample.description: sample of import partners without locatable geometry

unmatched_importer_codes_sample.description: sample of importer codes without locatable geometry

value_final.description: canonical trade value used by the pipeline

value_missing_distance.description: trade value associated with missing distance information

variance_H0.description: expected variance under the null hypothesis

window_ARI_vs_full_max.description: maximum window ARI against full clustering

window_ARI_vs_full_mean.description: mean window ARI against full clustering

window_ARI_vs_full_min.description: minimum window ARI against full clustering

window_ARI_vs_full_std.description: standard deviation of window ARI against full clustering

window_NMI_vs_full_max.description: maximum window NMI against full clustering

window_NMI_vs_full_mean.description: mean window NMI against full clustering

window_NMI_vs_full_min.description: minimum window NMI against full clustering

window_NMI_vs_full_std.description: standard deviation of window NMI against full clustering

x.description: x coordinate on the unit sphere or projected trajectory space

y.description: y coordinate on the unit sphere or projected trajectory space

z.description: z-score or z coordinate depending on dataset context

inconsistencies.issue: raw product identifier uses compact legacy naming while dictionary outputs use snake_case
multiple identifier fields represent country-like entities under different names depending on stage context
global barycenter outputs omit the _final_ token while per-country barycenter outputs include it
USA compatibility outputs embed a country-specific token in the variable name instead of using the generic barycenter schema
abbreviations and acronyms appear in several derived variables, so naming is not uniformly verbose
mixed lowercase and uppercase suffixes break strict snake_case consistency
clustering distance matrices use dynamic ISO3 country codes as column headers; these are entity-instance headers rather than stable semantic variable names
raw parquet includes exporter-side and importer-side value columns, but canonical downstream stages standardize on value_final
